# src/quality/phantom-paths

Detects phantom path references in AGENTS.md files — paths documented but not present on disk.

## Contents

- **[index.ts](./index.ts)** — Re-exports `checkPhantomPaths` validator from `./validator.js`
- **[validator.ts](./validator.ts)** — Implements `checkPhantomPaths(agentsMdPath, content, projectRoot)` which extracts paths via `PATH_PATTERNS`, resolves them relative to AGENTS.md directory and project root, checks existence with `existsSync`, returns `PhantomPathInconsistency[]` with context lines

## Behavioral Contracts

### Path Extraction Patterns

`PATH_PATTERNS`:
- Markdown links: `/\[(?:[^\]]*)\]\((\.[^)]+)\)/g`
- Backtick paths: `/`((?:src\/|\.\.?\/)[^`]+\.[a-z]{1,4})`/g`
- Prose paths: `/(?:from|in|by|via|see)\s+`?(src\/[\w\-./]+)`?/gi`

`SKIP_PATTERNS`:
- `/node_modules/`
- `/.git/`
- `/^https?:\/\//`
- `/{{\}/` — template placeholders
- `/$\{/` — template placeholders
- `/\*/` — globs
- `/\{[^}]*,[^}]*\}/` — brace expansion

### Resolution Strategy

1. Resolve path from AGENTS.md directory
2. Resolve path from project root
3. For `.js` extensions, try `.ts` variant (TypeScript import convention)
4. Deduplicate via `seen` Set
5. Capture context line (120 chars) for each phantom path

## File Relationships

`validator.ts` imports `PhantomPathInconsistency` from `../types.js`. `index.ts` barrel-exports `checkPhantomPaths` for consumption by quality check orchestrator at `src/quality/index.ts`.
